html:
The Thulecite Suit is a craftable Item found in the Ancient Pseudoscience Filter. It requires 4 Nightmare Fuel, 6 Thulecite and an Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft. It also has a 33% chance to be found inside a Large Ornate Chest. Like all items from the Ancient Tab, Thulecite Suits cannot be prototyped and Characters always need to be near an Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft them again.

When equipped in the chest slot, the Thulecite Suit acts as an Armor that will absorb 90% of physical damage and has 1800 Durability. While equipped it also increases the Character's Sanity by 3.3 per minute. Not considering its durability, the Thulecite Suit effectively adds 1350 hp to the average survivor.

Players have a 0.02% chance of finding Green Gems inside Tumbleweeds, thus making Thulecite Suits renewable, since more Thulecite can be gained with the use of Construction Amulets and Deconstruction Staffs as described below.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Jagged Grand Suit, Silken Grand Suit, Steadfast Grand Suit, and Whispering Grand Suit skins were introduced during the official The Forge event in 2018.
  • The Loyal Nouveau Crown skin was awarded for watching 3 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from Jule 27, 2022 to August 10, 2022.
Woven - Elegant
Forge Collection
Jagged Grand Suit
Whatever you do, don't look down!
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Forge Collection
Silken Grand Suit
Don't let the delicate belt fool you, this plate is robust as any.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Forge Collection
Steadfast Grand Suit
Staunch and unyielding. As formidable, as it is rare.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Forge Collection
Whispering Grand Suit
This suit of armor is keeping an eye out for your well-being.
See ingame
Loyal
Art Nouveau Collection
Nouveau Thulecite Suit
This armor is a wearable work of art.
See ingame

Tips

  • While providing slightly less protection compared to the Night Armor and Marble Suit, the Thulecite has more Durability and no drawbacks, making it more favorable to craft.
  • Unlike Dress items, wearing the Thulecite Suit to regain Sanity will not decrease its durability, allowing infinite Sanity regeneration, as long as players don't get hit enough for it to break.
  • It is possible to use a Construction Amulet to craft 5 Thulecite Suits for 15 Thulecite, then use a Deconstruction Staff on those 5 Thulecite Suits to get 30 Thulecite back for a profit of 13 Thulecite (the Amulet costs 2 Thulecite). Doing this multiple times makes it possible to collect big amounts of Thulecite from a few Green Gems.

Trivia

  • The Thulecite Suit was added in A Moderately Friendly Update.
  • Like all other chest slot armors, this suit also makes a slight noise while the player is moving with it equipped.

The Thulecite Suit is a craftable Item found in the Ancient Pseudoscience Filter. It requires 4 Nightmare Fuel, 6 Thulecite and an Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft. It also has a 33% chance to be found inside a Large Ornate Chest. Like all items from the Ancient Tab, Thulecite Suits cannot be prototyped and Characters always need to be near an Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft them again.
When equipped in the chest slot, the Thulecite Suit acts as an Armor that will absorb 90% of physical damage and has 1800 Durability. While equipped it also increases the Character's Sanity by 3.3 per minute. Not considering its durability, the Thulecite Suit effectively adds 1350 hp to the average survivor.
Players have a 0.02% chance of finding Green Gems inside Tumbleweeds, thus making Thulecite Suits renewable, since more Thulecite can be gained with the use of Construction Amulets and Deconstruction Staffs as described below.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bộ đồ Thulecite là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được tìm thấy trong Bộ Lọc Giả Khoa Cổ Đại. Nó cần 4 Nhiên Liệu Ác Mộng, 6 Thulecite và Trạm Giả Khoa Học Cổ Đại để chế tạo. Nó cũng có 33% cơ hội được tìm thấy bên trong Rương trang trí công phu lớn. Giống như tất cả vật phẩm trong Thẻ Cổ, Trang phục Thulecite không thể tạo nguyên mẫu và Nhân vật luôn cần ở gần Trạm Giả khoa học Cổ đại để chế tạo lại chúng.

Doing this multiple times makes it possible to collect big amounts of Thulecite from a few Green Gems. == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Thulecite Suit was added in ''[[Don't Starve/Version History#A Moderately Friendly Update|A Moderately Friendly Update]]''. * Like all other chest slot armors, this suit also makes a slight noise while the player is moving with it equipped. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == Thulecite Suit= Thulecite Suit Dropped.png|Dropped Thulecite Suit Equipped.png|Equipped |-| Jagged Grand Suit= Jagged Grand Suit Dropped.png|Dropped Jagged Grand Suit Equipped.png|Equipped |-| Silken Grand Suit= Silken Grand Suit Dropped.png|Dropped Silken Grand Suit Equipped.png|Equipped |-| Steadfast Grand Suit= Steadfast Grand Suit Dropped.png|Dropped Steadfast Grand Suit Equipped.png|Equipped |-| Whispering Grand Suit= Whispering Grand Suit Dropped.png|Dropped Whispering Grand Suit Equipped.png|Equipped |-| Nouveau Thulecite Suit= Nouveau Thulecite Suit Dropped.png|Dropped Nouveau Thulecite Suit Equipped.png|Equipped == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Thulecite Suit Wilson.png|[[Wilson]] wearing a Thulecite Suit.
